name: Renamer
description: Bulk-renamers Cove library items using configurable metadata templates. Reads and writes video and image files on disk and updates the matching Cove database records, always disk and DB together. Exposes preview, renamer, and undo API endpoints under /api/extensions/com.alextomas955.renamer. Needs videos.read to preview and videos.write to renamer or undo. Makes no network calls and runs no scraper or downloader code.
author: alextomas955
